query: Which consultancy is the subject of the suspicion and in which country is it based?
ground_truth: Adriatic Advisory d.o.o., based in Split, Croatia.

query: What is the cumulative payment volume to Adriatic Advisory and over what period?
Who approved all invoices and which group policy was breached in the process?
ground_truth: Mr. K. Petrović (Regional Sales Director SEE) approved all 9 invoices on his own. The second signature from the Legal department required by group policy BR-COM-02 §7 is missing in every case.

query: Which three public-sector contracts are temporally linked to the success fees?
ground_truth: Zagreb-UKC (university hospital, EUR 4.2 million, award 2025-02-20), Sarajevo barracks (EUR 2.4 million, award 2025-06-30) and Split-UKC (EUR 4.4 million, award 2025-10-15).

query: Who first reported the internal suspicion, and to whom?
ground_truth: Marko Schneider (Deputy Head of Internal Audit) reported on 2026-02-19 to Dr. Bauer (Compliance Officer).
